scripts.build:prod: pnpm --filter @aiaget/shared-types build && pnpm --filter @aiaget/external-api-sdk build && pnpm --filter @aiaget/control-api build && pnpm --filter @aiaget/web build
scripts.dev:control-api: pnpm --filter @aiaget/shared-types build && set -a && . ./.env && set +a && pnpm --filter @aiaget/control-api dev
scripts.dev:web: pnpm --filter @aiaget/shared-types build && set -a && . ./.env && set +a && pnpm --filter @aiaget/web dev
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @aiaget/shared-types build && node --test scripts/tests/*.test.mjs && pnpm --filter @aiaget/control-api exec tsx --test src/common/controller-permissions-contract.test.ts src/common/services/security-event.service.test.ts src/platform-events/platform-events-dedupe.test.ts src/agent-teams/agent-teams-production-closure.test.ts src/billing/billing-quota-enforcement.test.ts src/conversations/conversations-runtime-projection.test.ts src/models/models-runtime-options.test.ts src/models/openai-compatible-client.test.ts src/external-api/external-channel-security.test.ts src/channels/channel-operations-security.test.ts src/channels/channel-sender-task.service.test.ts src/channels/channel-release-scheduler.service.test.ts src/plugins/plugin-policy.test.ts src/plugins/plugin-hook-execution.service.test.ts src/plugins/plugin-package-integrity.service.test.ts src/plugins/plugins.service.test.ts src/plugins/plugins.controller.test.ts src/runtime-execution/runtime-workflow-status.test.ts src/runtime-execution/runtime-execution.service.test.ts src/security-center/security-approval-workbench.service.test.ts src/security-center/security-center-overview-approval-workbench.test.ts src/security-center/security-events-ledger.test.ts src/security-center/security-operation-alert-notification-task.service.test.ts src/security-center/security-operation-alert-sla.service.test.ts src/knowledge/knowledge-e2e.test.ts src/knowledge/search-backends.test.ts src/knowledge/knowledge-retrieval.test.ts && pnpm --filter @aiaget/web test:ia
scripts.verify:prod-template: docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.production.yml --env-file .env.production.example config >/dev/null && pnpm verify:observability-template && pnpm verify:prod-runbook
scripts.verify:prod: pnpm validate:prod-env && docker compose -f deploy/docker-compose.production.yml --env-file .env.production config >/dev/null && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && python3 -m compileall apps/agent-runtime/app
